visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split screen showing a colorful, viscous pink and yellow liquid being poured into a mold. A young woman in a light green top is visible, her mouth moving rapidly with wide facial expressions while she holds a small package. She has long dark hair and uses frequent hand gestures. (2) The scene cuts to showing cubes of multi-colored marshmallows being sliced. The woman is then seen discovering a large pink shipping box labeled 'Cloud Theory' on the floor outside a doorway; she picks it up and carries it into a room with white walls and a simple wooden chair. (3) She opens the box with a wide-eyed, surprised expression, revealing multiple square transparent boxes filled with marshmallows of various colors and toppings. She holds up a white card with black writing and gestures toward the boxes with her hands raised near her face. (4) A series of close-up shots show individual cube-shaped marshmallows decorated with sprinkles, a strawberry slice, cookie crumbles, and a dried flower. She picks up each piece and places it in her mouth, chewing with exaggerated jaw movements while positioned close to a black microphone on a stand. (5) In the final segment, she stands in front of the camera holding two boxes of the product. She points at the boxes and then at the screen, smiling and nodding her head. The background consists of a plain white wall and a wooden door frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 來源출처 틱톡 Cloud Theory. [Slogan]: 美國·澳洲紅到不行?! [Slogan]: ☁️雲朵棉花糖🌈. [Subtitle]: 台灣絕對買不到?! (2) [Subtitle]: 在澳洲🇦🇺, 美國🇺🇸已經超爆紅欸. [Variety]: 🧪實驗歐膩🇰🇷. (3) [Variety]: 沒有? 買不到? (4) [Slogan]: 購買方法1 在澳洲·美國網購 🎁. (5) [Slogan]: 購買方法2 去澳洲·美國的Costco買. [Logo]: 來源출처 틱톡 Sarah Betts. (6) [Variety]: (有璟在說明的時候...). [Variety]: ??? 誰來了? (7) [Subtitle]: 這什麼東西? (慌張到講韓語). (8) [Subtitle]: 該不是... 是影片中的澳洲雲朵棉花糖😳. (9) [Subtitle]: 我收到了一封信. [Variety]: 感動. (10) [Subtitle]: 我跟這位老闆有小小故事以後有機會再分享!!!. [Variety]: (等等會有抽獎, 記得看到底!). (11) [Slogan]: 🍦香草口味. [Subtitle]: 天啊 這不是一般的Q軟感. [Subtitle]: 有水分感的Q彈!!!! [Subtitle]: 也太好吃了吧... (12) [Slogan]: 🍓草莓口味. [Variety]: 超Q. [Subtitle]: 老實說比我之前吃過的韓國那款. [Subtitle]: 這個好吃100倍. (13) [Slogan]: 🍪Cookies & Cream口味真的超高質感! 🥛🍫. (14) [Slogan]: 🌈彩虹口味. [Subtitle]: 每一種口味都很有特色. [Subtitle]: 拜託...大家也要吃看看. (15) [Slogan]: 🥥椰子口味. [Subtitle]: 意外完全是我的菜😍. (16) [Slogan]: 🍾香檳特殊版本. [Variety]: (有花香). [Subtitle]: 哇 真的有花香耶. [Subtitle]: 香檳+金箔紙+花. [Subtitle]: 蜂蜜香氣也超濃的🍯✨. (17) [Subtitle]: 其實多收到幾盒了!!. [Slogan]: 先吃. [Slogan]: 要不要進行抽獎😎. (18) [Slogan]: ⏰抽獎辦法. 1. 追蹤有璟 @602avenue. 2. 底下留言 & 轉發此Reels.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female host, 1 female in background/B-roll footage
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young East Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a light green knitted top and black shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor apartment setting with white walls, a wooden floor, a wooden chair, and a doorway. B-roll segments show a commercial kitchen environment and a retail warehouse setting (Costco).

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female voice speaking at a rapid pace with a bright, enthusiastic pitch. An upbeat electronic pop background music track with a steady 4/4 beat and electronic synth textures plays at a moderate volume. (2) A sharp percussive 'thud' of a box hitting a hard surface is heard, followed by the dry, crinkling sound of paper and cardboard being manipulated. The female voice exhibits a rising pitch contour and increased volume, suggesting excitement or surprise. (3) The middle section features high-fidelity acoustic textures. The BGM volume decreases significantly. Prominent percussive tapping sounds on plastic containers are heard, followed by extremely crisp, wet, and rhythmic chewing and mouth-smacking sounds. Each bite produces a distinct squishing and crunching noise. (4) Several high-pitched 'ding' sounds and short 'whoosh' transition effects are interspersed between the chewing sounds. The speaker continues to talk with a high vocal arousal and clear articulation. (5) The final segment features the music track returning to its original volume. The female voice maintains a high-energy, authoritative delivery style, concluding with a final melodic synth phrase from the background music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Discovery/Unboxing -> Tasting -> Recommendation -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce and review 'Cloud Theory' gourmet marshmallows, a trending product from Australia and the US, while using ASMR-style tasting to appeal to the audience and promoting a giveaway.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host unboxes, reviews, and highly recommends the product while conducting a specific giveaway campaign for the brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy, social-media-native review combining unboxing excitement with sensory ASMR elements to maximize viewer engagement.
